description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a spacious, open-plan interior layout. The exterior features large windows, including several floor-to-ceiling panes and a prominent bay window, allowing for ample natural light. The house includes multiple rooms such as a living area, kitchen, bedrooms, and bathrooms, all visible through the cutaway design. A green lawn or garden area is attached to one side, suggesting outdoor living space. The facade is clean and geometric, with a mix of white and gray surfaces and minimal decorative elements. The main entryway is centrally located, marked by a set of steps and a wide door, flanked by large windows.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and an attached green lawn. The design is open and geometric, with a clean white and gray exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, and the open-plan interior layout.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the attached green lawn and the depth of the house's layout.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional windows, a bay window, and the back rooms of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the secondary entry points and the arrangement of interior spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture and bay windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central wide door with steps, flanked by large windows and minimal overhang
